title: Private infra, real estate capital to play larger financing role in AI data center boom, Goldman says

Philips secures FDA clearance for Elevate Plus AI ultrasound upgrade
description: Philips has received 510(k) clearance for Elevate Plus, which adds imaging and AI capabilities to its EPIQ Elite and Affiniti ultrasound systems. The post Philips secures FDA clearance for Elevate Plus AI ultrasound upgrade appeared first on Hospital Management .

title: TrustLogix Launches TrustAI Integration with Snowflake AI Data Cloud, Bringing Scalable Agentic AI Data Security to Enterprise Teams
description: TrustLogix and Snowflake joint customers can now enforce fine-grained, attribute-based access control for AI agents built in Snowflake Cortex AI, with continuous data access monitoring through the TrustLogix platform. TrustLogix, the AI-powered data security and governance platform for enterprise data environments, today announced at Snowflake’s annual user conference, Snowflake Summit 26,...
